title: Populating Next Right Pointers in Each Node

content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Populating Next Right Pointers in Each Node". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/populating-next-right-pointers-in-each-node/
constraints: The number of nodes in the tree is in the range [1, 10^4]
Node.left == null and Node.right == null for the rightmost and leftmost nodes
content.inputFormat: A tree node with a value and four pointers (left, right, next, and a flag to indicate if the node is a root node)
content.outputFormat: The root of the modified tree with next pointers populated

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use a level order traversal to populate the next pointers
